scripts.build: vite build && vite build --config vite.config.content.ts && vite build --config vite.config.bg.ts
scripts.dev: concurrently "vite build --watch" "vite build --watch --config vite.config.content.ts" "vite build --watch --config vite.config.bg.ts"
scripts.postbuild: cp manifest.json dist/ && cp -r icons dist/
scripts.postdev: cp manifest.json dist/ && cp -r icons dist/
